rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Permission To File Overlength Opposition To Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: APPLICATION FOR OVERSIEZED BRIEF - GRANT. IN THE FUTURE APPLICATION SHOULD BE MADE PRIOR TO DATE OF HEARING. WRIT - DENY. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SAN JOSE MERCURY NEWS VS. CALIFORNIA PUBLIC EMPLOYEES RETIREMENT SYSTEM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Leave To Intervene
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO INTERVENE ON CONDITION NO CHANGE IN HEARING SCHEDULE. HEARING REQUIRED RE WHAT SPECIFIC DOCUMENTS INTERVENOR WISH TO FILE AND WHAT SPECIFIC TESTIMONY THEY WANT TO INTRODUCE. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: SAN JOSE MERCURY NEWS VS. CALIFORNIA PUBLIC EMPLOYEES RETIREMENT SYSTEM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: To File Declarations Under Seal
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO SEAL RECORD DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. INTERVENOR MUST PROVIDE SPECIFICS AS TO WHAT INFORMATION IS CONFIDENTIAL. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: ACADEMY OF ART COLLEGE FOUNDATION VS. ESPI SANJANA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND GRANTED. COURT ACCEPTS REPRESENTATION OF COUNSEL IN POINTS AND AUTHORITIES AS SUFFICIENT EXPLANATION TO ALLOW AMENDMENT. (302/AJR/KS(EX))

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. MOEZ TURKI et al
